user.title: Herold setup
user.description: Basic settings for the Herold notification hub.

rooms.title: Add room
rooms.description: At least one of assist satellite or media player is required. Multiple occupancy sensors are OR-linked.

chat.title: Chat (Telegram)
chat.description: Optional: Telegram delivery with inline answer buttons. The pending question helper keeps legacy open-question automations working.

llm.title: LLM (internal reminders)
llm.description: Optional: conversation agents that execute P0 self-reminders (herold.remind_self). The fallback agent takes over when the primary one fails, e.g. a local Ollama while offline.

error.room_no_output: At least one of assist satellite or media player must be set.
error.room_no_occupancy: Select at least one occupancy sensor.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single instance is allowed.

error.room_no_output: At least one of assist satellite or media player must be set.
error.room_no_occupancy: Select at least one occupancy sensor.
error.no_rooms_left: At least one room must remain configured.

send.name: Send notification
send.description: Sends a fire-and-forget notification through the Herold dispatcher (voice, push and Telegram).

recipient.name: Recipient
recipient.description: Person entity; defaults to the configured recipient.

target_player.name: Target player
target_player.description: Optional target that overrides room detection.

tag.name: Tag
tag.description: Optional tag for deduplication (used from Phase 4).

ttl_minutes.name: TTL (minutes)
ttl_minutes.description: Optional auto-expiry (used from a later phase).

callback_event.name: Callback event
callback_event.description: Legacy callback event id (only meaningful for queries).

query.name: Ask a query
query.description: Sends a question and waits for an answer via satellite conversation, Telegram buttons or the acknowledge service.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: yesno = yes/no buttons, open = free-text answer, choice = predefined options.

callback_event.name: Callback event
callback_event.description: Event id for the answer. Default AI_CONFIRM fires AI_YES/AI_NO (legacy compatible); a custom id XYZ fires XYZ_YES/XYZ_NO.

timeout_minutes.name: Timeout (minutes)
timeout_minutes.description: How long to wait for an answer before expiring.

default_answer.name: Default answer
default_answer.description: Used automatically when the timeout is reached.

recipient.name: Recipient
recipient.description: Person entity; defaults to the configured recipient.

target_player.name: Target player
target_player.description: Optional target that overrides room detection.

acknowledge.name: Answer a query
acknowledge.description: Resolves a pending query with an answer.

id.name: Query ID
id.description: The id of the pending query.

answer.name: Answer
answer.description: For yesno: Ja/Nein; for choice: one of the choices; for open: any text.

source.name: Source
source.description: Where the answer came from (for the answered event).

cancel.name: Cancel a query or schedule
cancel.description: Cancels a pending query or a scheduled notification without firing answer events.

id.name: ID
id.description: The id of the pending query or schedule.

schedule.name: Schedule a notification
schedule.description: Delivers a notification at a future time; survives restarts. Priority 0 runs the message as an LLM instruction through the internal channel.

scheduled_for.name: Scheduled for
scheduled_for.description: When to deliver: '+1h30m', '18:00' or an ISO datetime.

message.name: Message
message.description: The notification text (or LLM instruction for priority 0).

recipient.name: Recipient
recipient.description: Person entity; defaults to the configured recipient.

target_player.name: Target player
target_player.description: Optional target that overrides room detection.

tag.name: Tag
tag.description: Optional tag for deduplication (used from Phase 4).

remind_self.name: Remind self (LLM)
remind_self.description: Schedules a P0 self-reminder: at the given time the instruction is executed silently by the configured conversation agent.

instruction.name: Instruction
instruction.description: Self-directed prompt for the agent, e.g. 'Schalte das Wohnzimmerlicht aus.'
